---
title: "OC17_refinedMAG_tax_abundance_figS5"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(png)
library(pals)
library(patchwork)

```

```{r}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/"
```

```{r define color palettes}
c38 = c("#808080", "#d3d3d3", "#556b2f", "#a0522d", "#228b22", "#191970", "#8b0000", "#808000", "#008080", "#4682b4", "#9acd32", "#00008b", "#daa520", "#8fbc8f", "#8b008b", "#b03060", "#d2b48c", "#ff0000", "#00ced1", "#ff8c00", "#ffb6c1", "#0000cd", "#7fff00", "#9400d3", "#00ff7f", "#9370db", "#ff6347", "#ff00ff", "#1e90ff", "#f0e68c", "#dda0dd", "#90ee90", "#ff1493", "#ffa07a", "#ee82ee", "#87cefa", "#7fffd4", "#ffff00")

c26 <- c(
  "dodgerblue2", "#E31A1C", "green4", "#6A3D9A", "#FF7F00", "black", "gold1", "skyblue2", "#FB9A99", "palegreen2","#CAB2D6", "#FDBF6F", "gray70", "khaki2", "maroon", "orchid1", "deeppink1", "blue1", "steelblue4", "darkturquoise", "green1", "yellow4", "yellow3", "darkorange4", "brown", "#808080"
)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
coverm = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/merged_coverM/refined_coverM_all_06152026.csv", sep = ""))
genome_info = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_gtdb/gtdb_summary_06152026.csv", sep = ""))
catabolism_mags = read_csv(paste0(rootdir, "/refined_analysis/refined_tables/catabolism_MAGs_06152026.csv"))
catabolism_mags = catabolism_mags %>%
  dplyr::rename("genome" = "x")
genome_info = merge(genome_info, catabolism_mags, by = "genome")
```

```{r}
coverm$Sample = paste(coverm$site, coverm$depth, sep = "_")
coverm_QC = filter(coverm, covered_fraction >= 0.50)
sample_cov = coverm_QC %>% 
  group_by(Sample) %>% 
  summarise(Mean = sum(Mean))

coverm_QC = left_join(coverm_QC, sample_cov, "Sample")
coverm_QC <- coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "sample_cov", starts_with("Mean.y"))
coverm_QC <- coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "genome_cov", starts_with("Mean.x"))
coverm_QC$relative = coverm_QC$genome_cov/coverm_QC$sample_cov

total_data_coverage = sum(unique(coverm_QC$sample_cov))
coverm_QC$relative_total = coverm_QC$genome_cov/total_data_coverage
```

```{r}
genome_info = genome_info %>%
    mutate(
    phylum = str_extract(classification, "(?<=p__)[^;]+"),
    class  = str_extract(classification, "(?<=c__)[^;]+"),
    order  = str_extract(classification, "(?<=o__)[^;]+"),
    family = str_extract(classification, "(?<=f__)[^;]+")
  )
```

```{r}
genome_coverage = merge(genome_info, coverm_QC, by = "genome")
(unique(genome_coverage$phylum))
```

```{r}
genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  mutate(
    phylum2 = case_when(
      phylum == "Proteobacteria" & class == "Gammaproteobacteria" ~ "Gammaproteobacteria",
      phylum == "Proteobacteria" & class == "Alphaproteobacteria" ~ "Alphaproteobacteria",
      TRUE ~ phylum
    )
  )

phyla_list = unique(genome_coverage$phylum2)

# Output directory
outdir = file.path(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_figures/06152026/figureS3/")

for (ph in phyla_list) {
 phyla_df = genome_coverage %>% filter(phylum2 == ph)

  phyla_df = phyla_df %>%
    mutate(
      taxon_source = if_else(is.na(family) | family == "", "order", "family"),
      family2 = if_else(is.na(family) | family == "", order, family)
    )

   phyla_df_aggregate = phyla_df %>%
    group_by(Sample, family = family2, taxon_source) %>%
    summarise(relative_pct = sum(relative), .groups = "drop") %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      taxon_label = if_else(
        taxon_source == "order",
        paste0(family, " (Order)"),
        family
      )
    )
   
   phyla_df_aggregate <- phyla_df_aggregate %>%
  separate(
    col = Sample,         
    into = c("site", "depth"), 
    sep = "_", 
    remove = FALSE 
  )

  phyla_df_aggregate = phyla_df_aggregate %>%
    mutate(
      taxon_label = factor(
        taxon_label,
        levels = rev(sort(unique(taxon_label)))
      )
    )

 xmax = max(phyla_df_aggregate$relative_pct, na.rm = TRUE)

p = ggplot(phyla_df_aggregate,
           aes(fill = taxon_label, color = taxon_label,
               y = relative_pct, x = depth)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_grid(~factor(site, levels = c("OC6", "OC5", "OC4", "OC3", "OC2"))) +
  coord_flip() +
  ylab(paste("Relative Autotrophic MAG abundance -", ph)) +
  xlab("Depth") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c26) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c26) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("4000","3000","2000","1000","500","150","50")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, xmax)) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE),
    color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)
  )

  outfile = file.path(
    outdir,
    paste0("refined_figure2B_", tolower(ph), ".pdf")
  )

  ggsave(outfile, plot = p, width = 11, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 72)
  saveRDS(p, file = file.path(outdir, paste0("plot_", tolower(ph), ".rds")))
}

```

#6152026
```{r}
combine_plots_to_pdf = function(outdir,
                                plots_per_page = 6,
                                outfile = "figS3_combined_plot_06152026.pdf",
                                ncol = 2,
                                nrow = 3) {
  
  # 1. Load files
  rds_files = list.files(outdir, pattern = "^plot_.*\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(rds_files) == 0) stop("No plot_*.rds files found in: ", outdir)
  
  rds_files = sort(rds_files)
  plot_list = lapply(rds_files, readRDS)
  
  # 2. Pre-tag all plots continuously using uppercase letters
  for (i in seq_along(plot_list)) {
    plot_list[[i]] = plot_list[[i]] + ggtitle(LETTERS[i]) + 
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")) 
  }
  
  # 3. Split into pages
  groups = split(plot_list, ceiling(seq_along(plot_list) / plots_per_page))
  
  pdf_path = file.path(outdir, outfile)
  pdf(pdf_path, width = 16, height = 18)
  
  # 4. Wrap and print each page (without using plot_annotation tag_levels)
  for (grp in groups) {
    layout <- wrap_plots(grp, ncol = ncol, nrow = nrow)
    print(layout)
  }

  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
combine_plots_to_pdf(outdir,
                     plots_per_page = 6,
                     outfile = "combined_3page_6plots_per_page_06152026.pdf")
```
